name: Render Math
description: Renders LaTeX math equations to PNG images. Safe alternative to giving the agent exec permission just for math rendering.

binary.description: Path to the math2img binary. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/skills/math-images/scripts/math2img.

outputDir.description: Directory for rendered PNGs. Defaults to a temp directory.

defaultTheme.description: Default color theme for rendered equations.

binary.label: math2img binary path
binary.help: Absolute path to the math2img executable.

outputDir.label: Output directory
outputDir.help: Where rendered PNGs are written. Must be inside the agent media allowlist.

defaultTheme.label: Default theme
defaultTheme.help: dark or light — user can override per call.

timeoutSeconds.label: Render timeout (seconds)
timeoutSeconds.help: Max time math2img may run before the call fails.
